name: Telegram Channel
tagline: Chat with your BFrost assistant from Telegram — text, voice notes, and photos all work.
description:
Built-in channel adapter that connects your BFrost assistant to a Telegram bot. Once your bot token is configured, BFrost listens for messages and replies inline. Voice notes are transcribed automatically when Whisper is available.

This is a core infrastructure worker — it ships with every BFrost installation and cannot be removed.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Ships with BFrost. No standalone install needed.
